name: travis
description: Generated TGG ruleset: travis CST <-> Hub-IR. Bidirectional — the engine derives CST->IR and IR->CST from this one set (model a).

rules.name: R_travis_deployment_user_comment
rules.documentation: travis: user `# foo` comment under deployment <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_travis_job_user_comment
rules.documentation: travis: user `# foo` comment under job <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_travis_pipeline_user_comment
rules.documentation: travis: user `# foo` comment under pipeline <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_travis_secret_user_comment
rules.documentation: travis: user `# foo` comment under secret <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_travis_step_user_comment
rules.documentation: travis: user `# foo` comment under step <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_travis_pipeline_stages_stages_item_map
rules.documentation: travis: cst[pipeline].`stages` mixed-list MAPPING item <-> hub:pipeline.stages item->element->stage

rules.name: R_travis_pipeline_stages_stages_item_scalar
rules.documentation: travis: cst[pipeline].`stages` mixed-list SCALAR item <-> hub:pipeline.stages item->value

rules.name: R_travis_concept_trigger_branch_match
rules.documentation: travis: concept `trigger_branch_match` via path `branches.only` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=branches]
